name: @nihilux/roon-web-stack
description: a web stack, from api to web client, to use roon ia a browser
author: nihil@nihilux.org

scripts.frontend: bun run --filter @nihilux/roon-web-client build && bun run --filter @nihilux/roon-web-ng-client serve
scripts.ci: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build && bun run lint && bun run test
